projects.name: HawkerAI
projects.description: Singapore hawker dish calorie analyzer using Claude Vision API and HPB nutrition database. Upload a photo of your hawker meal and get an estimated calorie count with nutritional breakdown.
highlights: Production Claude API integration using vision capabilities
Portfolio project demonstrating applied AI engineering

projects.name: ask-adhi
projects.description: This portfolio chatbot — a terminal-style chat interface powered by Claude API with RAG over a personal knowledge base and structured tool calling.
highlights: RAG over resume using Supabase pgvector and Voyage AI embeddings
Claude tool-calling orchestration with 5 structured tools
Terminal aesthetic with randomised accent color per session

projects.name: LinkedIn Post Pipeline
projects.description: Multi-agent pipeline for generating LinkedIn posts using CrewAI and the Anthropic Claude API.
highlights: Demonstrates agentic AI engineering beyond single-model calls

projects.name: Tiny Tamagotchi
projects.description: Virtual pet app built for the DeepLearning.AI 7-Day Learner Challenge (submitted April 2025). Built using spec-driven development via Claude Code.
highlights: Spec-driven development workflow with Claude Code

experience.focus: Agentic AI engineering — building MCP servers for Jira, GitLab, and Control-M; architecting a multi-agent WPF-to-React migration pipeline using GitHub Copilot; Kafka SASL_SSL/SCRAM-SHA-512 integration in Spring Framework; Checkmarx security vulnerability remediation in Java.
